description: Live advisory sources pulled by VulnFinder at scan time. Edit or add to this file in the repo to add new sources — the scanner fetches the latest copy on every run.

sources.name: CISA — Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (Microsoft)
sources.note: CISA's KEV catalog — CVEs confirmed to be under active exploitation. Microsoft-only entries are kept.

sources.name: MSRC — Security Updates blog
sources.note: Official Microsoft Security Response Center announcements.

sources.name: BleepingComputer — Microsoft coverage
sources.note: BleepingComputer news feed, filtered for Microsoft-related stories.

sources.name: The Hacker News — Microsoft tag
sources.note: THN general feed filtered client-side for Microsoft stories.

sources.name: NVD — recent Windows CVEs
sources.note: National Vulnerability Database search for CVEs mentioning Windows, last 30 days.
